data.title: Iovance Biotherapeutics Announces Upcoming Board Member Retirement
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Iovance Biotherapeutics ( (IOVA) ) just unveiled an update.

On March 17, 2026, Iovance Biotherapeutics announced that board member Wendy Yarno will retire from its Board of Directors and will not stand for re-election at the company’s annual meeting of stockholders expected in June 2026. Yarno will continue to serve as a director until the annual meeting, and the company emphasized that her decision was not related to any disagreement over Iovance’s operations, policies, or practices, while publicly thanking her for her service to the board.

The planned retirement signals an upcoming change in Iovance’s board composition later in 2026, though the company indicated a stable governance environment by clarifying there were no underlying disputes driving the decision. Stakeholders are likely to view the transition as an orderly refresh of board membership rather than a sign of internal conflict or strategic upheaval.

The most recent analyst rating on (IOVA) stock is a Hold with a $4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Iovance Biotherapeutics stock, see the IOVA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IOVA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IOVA is a Neutral.

Overall score reflects strong technical momentum and a positive earnings-call backdrop around accelerating product revenue and improving margins, partially offset by weak underlying financial performance driven by large losses and continued cash burn. Valuation is constrained by negative earnings (negative P/E) and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on IOVA stock, click here.

More about Iovance Biotherapeutics

Iovance Biotherapeutics, Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing and commercializing novel cancer immunotherapies. Its work centers on advancing innovative treatments for oncology patients, positioning the company within the rapidly evolving immuno-oncology market.

Average Trading Volume: 15,035,060

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $1.59B

data.title: Eterna Therapeutics Faces Nasdaq Delisting Risk After Notice
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Eterna Therapeutics ( (ERNA) ) is now available.

On March 18, 2026, Ernexa Therapeutics Inc. received notice from Nasdaq that its common stock failed to maintain the required minimum bid price of $1.00 per share for 30 consecutive business days, breaching Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). Because Ernexa conducted a reverse stock split within the prior year, it is not eligible for the standard 180-day grace period to regain compliance under Nasdaq rules.

The company will request a hearing before a Nasdaq Hearings Panel, which will stay any suspension or delisting action while the process is pending, and the panel may grant an extension of up to 180 days from the date of the notice. Ernexa plans to present a remediation strategy to restore compliance, but it warned investors there is no assurance the panel will rule in its favor or that its securities will remain listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market.

More about Eterna Therapeutics

Ernexa Therapeutics Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated company whose common stock is listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market. The company’s shares are subject to Nasdaq’s minimum bid price and other continued listing requirements that govern eligibility to remain on the exchange.

Average Trading Volume: 1,592,111

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $7.87M

For a thorough assessment of ERNA stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Nuburu Board Sets 2026 Pay Amid Turnaround Oversight
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Nuburu ( (BURU) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Effective March 16, 2026, Nuburu’s board approved a series of 2025 bonuses and 2026 pay packages for its co-CEOs, Alessandro Zamboni and Dario Barisoni, after a year marked by a new co-CEO model and a corporate turnaround push. For 2025, each co-CEO received an annual bonus equal to 100% of applicable salary, a $90,000 one-time transition award tied to the October 1, 2025 shift to the co-CEO structure, and additional special awards, including $330,000 to Barisoni for leading a transformational acquisition and operational restoration, and $60,000 to Zamboni for liquidity stabilization and capital raising.

Looking ahead to 2026, the board set both co-CEOs’ base salaries at $600,000 and adopted a new annual incentive plan, while also raising compensation for independent directors to reflect heavy governance demands during the company’s ongoing turnaround. Non-employee directors were granted standardized 2026 cash retainers by role, a one-time $45,000 award for extraordinary 2025 service, and an extra $25,000 retainer for 2026 that will be paid quarterly and will sunset once full executive management is restored or at year-end 2026, underscoring the board’s expectation of continued intensive oversight.

Spark’s Take on BURU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BURU is a Underperform.

Nuburu’s overall stock score reflects significant financial instability, with weak income and cash flow performance, a concerning balance sheet, and poor technical indicators. However, the recent strategic partnership with HUMBL offers a potential growth avenue, partially offsetting negative financial metrics.

To see Spark’s full report on BURU stock, click here.

More about Nuburu

Nuburu, Inc. operates with a co-chief executive officer structure and an independent board, reflecting a governance framework focused on turnaround execution, capital structure stabilization, and maintaining stock exchange listing compliance. The company’s leadership and directors appear to be engaged in intensive restructuring and acquisition activity aimed at restoring core operations and de-risking the business.

Average Trading Volume: 17,315,352

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $21.59M

data.title: Mission Produce and Calavo Growers Set April Vote on Premium Merger Deal
data.description:
New activity is brewing for Calavo Growers ( (CVGW) ). The company has submitted a Form DEFM14A to the SEC, indicating an upcoming shareholder vote. This form gives shareholders all the information they need to develop an informed vote. Read on to learn more about the proposed company action.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Mission Produce, Inc. and Calavo Growers, Inc. have agreed to merge in a stock-and-cash transaction under which each Calavo share will be converted into $14.85 in cash plus 0.9790 shares of Mission Produce common stock. Based on recent Mission Produce prices, the deal implies a roughly $27 per-share value for Calavo, a premium of about 26% to its 30-day average, with Calavo holders expected to own about 20% of the combined company.

The transaction, unanimously approved by both boards, requires approval from Mission Produce stockholders and Calavo shareholders at virtual special meetings scheduled for April 28, 2026. If completed, the deal will consolidate two major avocado players under the Mission Produce banner, potentially strengthening scale and market reach, while giving Calavo investors a premium payout and ongoing equity stake in the enlarged business.

The most recent analyst rating on (CVGW) stock is a Hold with a $26.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Calavo Growers stock, see the CVGW Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CVGW Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CVGW is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improving fundamentals—especially a very strong, low-leverage balance sheet—and positive corporate developments (pending acquisition and removal of SEC overhang). These are tempered by weakening recent sales/margins/cash-flow versus FY2025 and soft technical momentum, while valuation is neutral-to-supportive due to the ~3.2% dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on CVGW stock, click here.

More about Calavo Growers

Calavo Growers, Inc. is a California-based company in the fresh produce industry, focused on packing, marketing and distributing avocados and related food products. The company’s shares trade on Nasdaq under the ticker CVGW, positioning it alongside Mission Produce, Inc., another Nasdaq-listed avocado specialist, in the global fresh produce market.

Current Market Cap: $436.5M

data.title: United Security Bancshares Advances Merger Amid Shareholder Challenges
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from United Security Bancshares ( (UBFO) ).

Community West Bancshares and United Security Bancshares, which signed a merger agreement on December 16, 2025, have advanced their planned combination with the U.S. securities regulator declaring their registration statement effective on February 24, 2026 and both banks scheduling March 30, 2026 shareholder meetings after mailing a joint proxy statement and prospectus at the end of February. Following the merger announcement, two shareholder lawsuits were filed in New York in early March 2026 and additional demand letters alleged disclosure deficiencies in the deal materials, prompting the companies—while denying any wrongdoing—to issue extensive supplemental financial and transactional disclosures to moot the claims, reduce legal distraction and keep the transaction timeline on track, while affirming their view that existing disclosures already met legal requirements.

The most recent analyst rating on (UBFO) stock is a Buy with a $11.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on United Security Bancshares stock, see the UBFO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on UBFO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, UBFO is a Outperform.

United Security Bancshares is in a stable financial position with strong technical momentum and positive corporate developments. The merger with Community West Bancshares is a significant positive factor, expected to enhance growth prospects. However, challenges in revenue growth and profitability margins slightly temper the overall outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on UBFO stock, click here.

More about United Security Bancshares

United Security Bancshares is a California-based bank holding company whose primary business is conducted through its wholly owned subsidiary, United Security Bank. The company operates in community banking, focusing on loans, deposits and related financial services in its regional markets, and is now poised to combine with Community West Bancshares to create a larger West Coast community banking platform.

data.description:

Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. ( (ECO) ) has provided an update.

Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp., a dual-listed international tanker owner specializing in the seaborne transport of crude oil and refined products, operates a modern fleet of scrubber-fitted Suezmax and VLCC vessels. The company is incorporated in the Marshall Islands and trades on the Oslo and New York stock exchanges, underscoring its access to global capital markets and its role in long-haul energy shipping.

The company has filed its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, making the audited financial statements available through both the SEC and its own website. By formally publishing its year-end financials, Okeanis Eco Tankers enhances transparency for investors and regulators, providing stakeholders with detailed insight into its performance and positioning in the volatile tanker and energy transport markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (ECO) stock is a Buy with a $51.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. stock, see the ECO Stock Forecast page.

More about Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp.

Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. is a leading international tanker company that provides seaborne transportation of crude oil and refined products. Incorporated in 2018 under the laws of the Marshall Islands, it is listed on both the Oslo Stock Exchange and the New York Stock Exchange, and operates a fleet of eight modern scrubber-fitted Suezmax tankers and eight modern scrubber-fitted VLCC tankers.

data.title: Natural Alternatives Reassigns CEO Role to Lead Swiss Operations
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Natural Alternatives International ( (NAII) ) has provided an update.

Natural Alternatives International, Inc. amended Chief Executive Officer Mark A. LeDoux’s employment agreement effective May 1, 2026, cutting his base salary from $475,000 to $255,000 and reducing certain officer benefits. At the same time, LeDoux entered into a separate employment agreement to serve as Managing Director of the company’s Swiss subsidiary, Natural Alternatives International, Inc. Europe, with a base salary of 170,000 CHF per year.

The company structured the U.S. and Swiss agreements so that LeDoux’s total compensation remains roughly unchanged, subject to currency fluctuations, while requiring him to spend at least half his time in Switzerland. By having its CEO concurrently lead the Swiss unit and remain board chair of both entities, Natural Alternatives aims to expand worldwide revenue and enhance its Swiss operations to give customers more opportunities to grow inside and outside the U.S.

The most recent analyst rating on (NAII) stock is a Sell with a $2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Natural Alternatives International stock, see the NAII Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NAII Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NAII is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak profitability (operating and net losses with low gross margin) and increased leverage, despite a strong TTM revenue rebound. Technical signals also remain soft (negative MACD, sub-50 RSI, and price below short-term moving averages). Positive operating and free cash flow provide some support, but losses and volatility keep the overall profile pressured.

To see Spark’s full report on NAII stock, click here.

More about Natural Alternatives International

Natural Alternatives International, Inc. operates in the nutritional supplements and wellness sector, manufacturing and supplying dietary supplement products and related formulations. The company serves global customers through its operations in the U.S. and its wholly owned Swiss subsidiary, Natural Alternatives International, Inc. Europe, reflecting a strategic focus on international markets and expanded production capabilities.

data.title: Oncolytics Biotech Shifts Corporate Domicile to British Columbia
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Oncolytics Biotech ( (ONCY) ) has issued an announcement.

Oncolytics Biotech has completed a corporate continuance that shifts the governing framework for its common shares from Alberta corporate law to the British Columbia Business Corporations Act. As part of this process, the company adopted new Notice of Articles and Articles for Oncolytics British Columbia, which became effective upon issuance of the Certificate of Continuation and now define shareholder rights under the new jurisdiction.

The move introduces certain differences in shareholder rights compared with the prior Alberta structure, as outlined in the company’s previously filed management information circular/prospectus. The filing also highlights that the company’s expectations about subsequent corporate steps, including a planned domestication and Nasdaq trading as a Nevada corporation, remain subject to regulatory risks and other uncertainties disclosed in its SEC filings.

The most recent analyst rating on (ONCY) stock is a Buy with a $7.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Oncolytics Biotech stock, see the ONCY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ONCY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ONCY is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, sizable losses, heavy cash burn, and a sharply reduced equity base that raises financing risk). Technicals are a near-term positive with price above major moving averages and positive momentum indicators, while valuation remains difficult to support due to the negative P/E and lack of dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on ONCY stock, click here.

More about Oncolytics Biotech

data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Intelligent Protection Management ( (IPM) ) has issued an announcement.

Intelligent Protection Management Corp. has released an investor presentation outlining its positioning as a U.S.-based managed technology solutions provider specializing in cybersecurity and cloud infrastructure, highlighting its secure private cloud, 24/7 support model, and deep experience in regulated industries. The materials underscore IPM’s focus on delivering cost-efficient, security-centric IT services, leveraging long-term data center leases and a scalable infrastructure footprint to support enterprises and smaller businesses alike.

The presentation details IPM’s transformation following its January 2025 acquisition of Newtek Technology Solutions for cash and preferred stock, which added more than 50 employees and over 17,000 customers and made the first quarter of 2025 its initial operational quarter as a managed IT solutions provider. For full-year 2025, IPM reported $23.6 million in revenue with deferred revenue of $3.9 million, a 42% decline in net loss and positive adjusted EBITDA in the fourth quarter, supported by a business mix led by managed information technology services, and it highlighted cross-selling opportunities and a referral agreement with NewtekOne alongside a predictable, high-margin model as key elements of its growth strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (IPM) stock is a Hold with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Intelligent Protection Management stock, see the IPM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IPM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IPM is a Neutral.

The score is primarily supported by improving fundamentals (sharp 2025 revenue rebound, positive operating/free cash flow, and a low-leverage balance sheet) and constructive earnings-call progress (Q4 adjusted EBITDA turning positive and operational milestones). These are tempered by continued GAAP losses, a technically weak price trend (below key moving averages), and a less-informative negative P/E with no dividend yield provided.

To see Spark’s full report on IPM stock, click here.

More about Intelligent Protection Management

Intelligent Protection Management Corp. is a managed technology solutions provider focused on cybersecurity and cloud infrastructure for enterprises, commercial clients and small and medium-sized businesses across the U.S. The company offers managed IT security services, secure private cloud hosting, managed backup and disaster recovery, web hosting, professional and procurement services, and consulting for highly regulated industries such as banking, finance, healthcare, legal, energy, manufacturing and retail.

IPM operates U.S.-based leased Tier III data centers on both coasts with scalable, redundant infrastructure and no bandwidth consumption fees, and emphasizes security-first, high-touch service with CIS- and SOC 2-certified staff. It supports enterprise, mid-market and small-business customers on the same platform, maintains long-tenured personnel and high client retention, and also acts as a large white-label service provider for major technology vendors in regulated sectors.

data.title: reAlpha Finalizes CFO Separation Agreement and Severance Terms
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from reAlpha Tech Corp. ( (AIRE) ).

On February 25, 2026, reAlpha Tech Corp. terminated the employment of Chief Financial Officer Piyush Phadke, and on March 16, 2026, the two parties executed a separation agreement that formalized his exit. The agreement grants Phadke severance equal to two months of base salary, paid over a two‑month period starting March 31, 2026, and accelerates the vesting of 82,539 restricted stock units into an equivalent number of common shares, while all other unvested equity awards were forfeited and cancelled, clarifying the company’s financial and governance obligations related to his departure.

This separation package, which includes a broad release of claims and standard confidentiality and non‑disparagement provisions, closes out Phadke’s compensation arrangements and removes future vesting liabilities from reAlpha’s balance sheet. The resolution provides stakeholders with greater transparency around the cost and structure of the CFO transition, while signaling the company’s intent to manage executive departures through defined cash severance and equity acceleration terms that balance contractual commitments with the need to limit ongoing obligations.

The most recent analyst rating on (AIRE) stock is a Buy with a $2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on reAlpha Tech Corp. stock, see the AIRE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AIRE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AIRE is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by heavy losses and sustained cash burn despite rapid revenue growth and improved leverage. Weak technicals reinforce near-term risk, while positive corporate developments (expansion and M&A plans) provide some offset; valuation signals are limited due to the negative P/E and no dividend.
